title: C1 pedicle screw placement risks in patients with ponticulus posticus: a CTA retrospective simulation study
authors_text: Ping Wang, Han Meng, Lifeng Yu, Ruipeng Zhang, Xinyu Song, Tiantian She, Dan Wang, Yuehua Li.
venue: Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
abstract: Ponticulus posticus (POPO) may distort C1 surface landmarks for C1 pedicle screw (CPS) placement, raising concern for vertebral artery compromise (VAC). This single-center retrospective CTA simulation study of 141 subjects (bilateral POPO, unilateral POPO, and pure non-POPO) establishes a CTA-based workflow to identify POPO anatomies potentially suitable for CPS placement, simulating trajectories with PedicleScrewSimulator to quantify placement risk.
